todayMessage: Focus on the few projects that actually move the system forward today.

projects.name: COMPLIANCE
projects.description: Dial-norm-aware limiter and loudness compliance tool for stereo, 5.1, and 9.1.6 post workflows.
projects.latestVersion: Active line — exact version needs confirmation.
projects.firstAction: Open latest COMPLIANCE chat/source and confirm current version.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Multichannel limiter work active; Pro-L2-style output/gain-reduction metering in scope.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Lock the version number before writing more code.
projects.notToday: Do not polish visuals until version is confirmed.

projects.name: FOLEY ENGINE
projects.description: Generative Foley and movement-sound engine for creating/editing synced sound effects.
projects.firstAction: Review the last install/build result and confirm plugin IDs.
projects.blocker: Installs but is not seen in Ableton.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Plugin installs, but Ableton does not see it.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Open the FOLEY ENGINE chat and diagnose Ableton visibility.
projects.notToday: Do not add features until host visibility is fixed.

projects.name: GESTURE
projects.description: Performance modulation engine with XY pad, timeline, scenes, and Receiver companion plugin for cross-track modulation.
projects.latestVersion: No product plugin version yet; THETA_AAX_Sidechain_Spike_v0.1 packaged.
projects.firstAction: Build the spike locally and start the Q1–Q8 test procedure.
projects.blocker: Spike has not been compiled/DAW-tested; PACE WCGUIDs needed for AAX test.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Source ZIP for AAX sidechain feasibility spike handed off.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Build VST3/AU first and record spike test results.
projects.notToday: Do not write Receiver protocol until spike results are known.

projects.name: CREOSOTE
projects.description: Three-stage analog character processor evolved from EROSION, focused on tape/tube/compression character, limiter behavior, and EQ.
projects.latestVersion: Pending import from old EROSION project.
projects.nextAction: Import current EROSION project state and define the first CREOSOTE build in this workflow.
projects.firstAction: Open the old EROSION project/source and lock the current CREOSOTE version.
projects.blocker: Claude CREOSOTE extraction removed; current source of truth must be rebuilt from the old EROSION project.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Migration starting: former EROSION project becomes the active CREOSOTE project.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Import current EROSION/CREOSOTE source state into the Control Room.
projects.notToday: Do not rely on the Claude CREOSOTE extraction as active source of truth.
projects.sourceConfidenceNote: Claude CREOSOTE removed; pending ChatGPT/EROSION project import.

projects.name: CATHODE
projects.firstAction: Confirm current chat/source state before build.
projects.blocker: Needs project-specific current chat confirmation before overwriting.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Contextual visual bays and wide CRT/CRUSH layout work recently done.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Only touch if CATHODE becomes today's focus.
projects.notToday: Do not assume v16.48 is current without project confirmation.

projects.name: ATRIA
projects.description: Modular macro-ring multi-effect / sound-design processor with linked movement controls.
projects.nextAction: Continue CREOSOTE limiter transplant / LIMITER behavior fixes.
projects.blocker: Needs current project-specific extraction to lock exact latest state.
projects.lastKnownStatus: LIMITER section should copy CREOSOTE behavior/look/feel.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Only touch if ATRIA becomes today's focus.
projects.notToday: Do not rebuild until latest source/version is confirmed.

projects.name: ARECIBO
projects.description: Receiver/transmission-inspired texture instrument/effect with static, drift, interference, and signal-capture aesthetics.
projects.latestVersion: Moving to v16; prior v15.11 source known.
projects.nextAction: v16 file reorg / WAVE mode button preservation.
projects.blocker: Needs current project-specific extraction to lock exact version.
projects.lastKnownStatus: v16 line started; WAVE mode must remain a cycling button, not a knob.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Only touch if ARECIBO becomes today's focus.
projects.notToday: Do not let WAVE mode regress to a knob.

projects.name: TWILIGHT
projects.description: Regenerative ambience instrument for drones, harmonic fields, sample layers, MIDI-triggered voices, and atmospheric output.
projects.latestVersion: v15.61 / v16 context; exact active line needs confirmation.
projects.nextAction: File reorg phase / MIDI and preset stability continuation.
projects.firstAction: Confirm whether v15.61 or v16 is the true active line.
projects.blocker: Version line conflict needs project-specific confirmation.
projects.lastKnownStatus: MIDI triggering and preset crash fixes were active.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Only touch if TWILIGHT becomes today's focus.
projects.notToday: Do not continue build work until active version line is locked.

projects.name: FOCUSGRID
projects.description: Focus/productivity-inspired audio plugin concept; first-pass UI installed, DSP/features still to be built out.
projects.nextAction: v0.1.4 feature/control/DSP planning or visual concept pass.
projects.firstAction: Decide whether to start DSP/control architecture or keep visual concepting.
projects.decisionNeeded: Start feature/DSP architecture now or continue visual concepts first.
projects.recommendedChoice: Start with feature/control architecture before heavy visual polish.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Plugin appears in host after install.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Choose the next pass before writing code.
projects.notToday: Do not expand features without deciding the control architecture.
projects.sourceConfidenceNote: High confidence from current chat context.

projects.name: SceneMatch
projects.description: Post/audio tool for matching scene tone, ambience, and consistency across clips or takes.
projects.nextAction: Resolve compile/build errors and stabilize skeleton.
projects.firstAction: Open latest pasted build log and fix the first compile error.
projects.blocker: Build errors still need project-specific log fix.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Fresh JUCE project, build errors reported.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Continue from the latest build log.
projects.notToday: Do not add features until skeleton compiles.

projects.name: PrismForm
projects.description: Musician/sound-designer instrument/effect concept focused on new sound-shaping territory.
projects.nextAction: v1.1 synth lock compile fix / package fixed source ZIP.
projects.firstAction: Continue from the v1.1 compile-fix request.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Initial v1 build hit errors; v1.1 fix requested.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Fix compile blocker before design expansion.
projects.notToday: Do not add sound features until build is stable.

projects.name: PODBOSS
projects.description: End-to-end podcast/voiceover suite for leveling, cleanup, consistency, and possible video/audio export workflows.
projects.firstAction: Define phased MVP before adding more systems.
projects.decisionNeeded: Large product scope needs phased MVP.
projects.lastKnownStatus: UI prototype accepted with request for more contrast.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Only touch if PODBOSS becomes today's focus.
projects.notToday: Do not expand video/export scope until MVP is defined.

projects.name: TRANSLATE
projects.description: Mix-translation lab comparing mixes against playback targets with Translation Score, delta waterfall, Fix List, and optional macros.
projects.latestVersion: v0.1 product validation; HTML wireframes v1–v4.
projects.nextAction: Choose next UX pass: target-switched state or settings/preset browser.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Four standalone HTML wireframes accepted; no JUCE/plugin source yet.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Only touch if TRANSLATE becomes today's focus.
projects.notToday: Do not start JUCE source until UX flow is locked.

projects.name: HIERARCHY
projects.description: Multi-instance masking/priority processor where instances coordinate and perform per-band ducking.
projects.nextAction: POC v0.1 candidate: two-instance shared-memory IPC + 4-band priority ducking in Reaper VST3.
projects.firstAction: Choose POC size and branding direction.
projects.decisionNeeded: POC scope size and visual/brand identity.
projects.recommendedChoice: Start with the smallest useful IPC + 4-band ducking POC.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Only touch if HIERARCHY becomes today's focus.
projects.notToday: Do not build full UI before IPC is proven.

projects.name: ADAPTSCORE
projects.description: DAW-to-game-audio bridge for auditioning adaptive scores against Wwise/FMOD-style game state from inside the DAW.
projects.latestVersion: v0.2.0 source ZIP written/syntax-checked; not user-compiled/DAW-tested yet.
projects.nextAction: v0.3: remaining Sandbox slider attachments + first-pass LookAndFeel.
projects.firstAction: Run local build and WAAPI probe.
projects.blocker: User must run local build and WAAPI probe.
projects.lastKnownStatus: v0.1.0, v0.2.0, and WAAPI probe source ZIPs delivered.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Run the probe before deciding v0.3 scope.
projects.notToday: Do not integrate WAAPI into plugin until probe results are known.

projects.name: POLYGLOT
projects.description: Universal plugin parameter translator: standalone app plus Bridge plugin for porting presets/chains across vendors.
projects.latestVersion: v0.1 partial source only; Common layer complete, not packaged/compiled.
projects.nextAction: Continue v0.1 toward first full source ZIP.
projects.firstAction: Choose Standalone GUI, Bridge plugin, or CMake scaffolding next.
projects.recommendedChoice: CMake scaffolding first to prove Common/ layer links cleanly.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Common/ layer complete; awaiting next chunk choice.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Only touch if POLYGLOT becomes today's focus.
projects.notToday: Do not add more Common code until scaffolding strategy is chosen.

projects.name: FIELD
projects.description: Experimental texture/space processor involving XY control, grain delay/reverb blend, and end-of-chain stutter/smear behavior.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Known from memory as a THETA texture/space path.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Do not work until source of truth exists.

projects.name: EROSION
projects.description: Historical name/predecessor for CREOSOTE; the old EROSION project is being migrated into the active CREOSOTE workflow.
projects.latestVersion: Historical EROSION line; exact active CREOSOTE import pending.
projects.nextAction: Use the old EROSION project as the starting point for active CREOSOTE.
projects.blocker: Do not maintain EROSION as a separate active project unless intentionally revived.
projects.lastKnownStatus: EROSION is now a historical/migration note, not a separate active plugin line.

projects.name: THETA Limiter
projects.description: Planned standalone limiter product/extraction based on CREOSOTE limiter behavior.
projects.latestVersion: Planned / not yet started as separate product.
projects.blocker: Need confirm whether COMPLIANCE supersedes this or remains separate.
projects.decisionNeeded: Separate product or folded into COMPLIANCE.
projects.recommendedChoice: Treat COMPLIANCE as the active limiter path unless confirmed otherwise.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Handoff exists conceptually from CREOSOTE context.
